response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse environments, but lacks proven experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and client-facing advisory roles critical for this position, and his German proficiency is only basic despite the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven full-stack engineering at top-tier tech firms (Stripe, Shopify) with diverse tech stacks
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and dev-ops infrastructure setup
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the mandatory C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML expertise, IT architecture design, or requirements management experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, technical assessment of incoming requests, or project leadership in IT consulting
